The [[BlasTech Industries/Legends|BlasTech]] '''500 "ESPO" riot gun''' was manufactured specifically for the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority's]] brutal [[Security Police/Legends|Espo]] Troops.

==Description==
The ESPO was a short-barreled [[Rifle/Legends|rifle]] with an open-frame [[Stock/Legends|stock]]. Its strength was not in accuracy—indeed, it did not have much of that—but rather in its ability to hit anything within a general field of fire. Critics of the CSA have said that the rifle matched the CSA philosophy perfectly—when in doubt, shoot into a crowd, or so the cynics say.

This [[Riot gun/Legends|riot gun]] also had a close-range [[Stun/Legends|stun]] setting as well, meaning the wielder could switch the weapon to fire stun shots instead of lethal fire, however the close-range stun setting was limited to a range of only 9 [[Meter/Legends|meters]]. The sale of this weapon was restricted to legitimate military organizations and police forces only.<ref name="Rebellion Era Campaign Guide" />

It appears that during the years from the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] up to the [[Rebellion era]], this weapon underwent some improvements including a reduced weight from 4.5 [[Kilogram/Legends|kg]] to 2.2 kg as well as improvement to its long-range accuracy. The result was a cost increase of 1,000 to 1,200 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]].<ref name="Rebellion Era Campaign Guide" /><ref name="Clone Wars Campaign Guide" />

==History==
The Blastech 500 riot gun was standard issue for all Espos.<ref name="Rebellion Era Campaign Guide" /> Espos were known to use this weapon on constant-fire mode the majority of the time, as they could afford to waste power hosing it around without regard for collateral damage or innocent bystanders.
